calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-16-2026 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Annie Chan / Defendant in Pro Per;
Berry Pierce / Plaintiff in Pro Per.

This cause comes on regularly for Trial De Novo. All parties are sworn.

Appellant/ Defendant testifies on her own behalf. Documentary evidence has already been previously submitted.

Respondent/ Plaintiff testifies on his own behalf. Documentary evidence has already been previously submitted.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the Court orders matter submitted and takes matter under submission. Judge: Honorable Sharon Reardon; Clerk: Kevin Rayala; Not Reported (D624).
